keys.name: Maintenance Key
keys.location: Inside a locker in the workshop
keys.description: A worn key used by maintenance workers. It unlocks certain service doors.

keys.name: Sun Emblem Fragment
keys.location: Hidden behind a loose brick in the courtyard
keys.description: A broken fragment of an emblem. It looks like it could fit with another piece.

keys.name: Moon Emblem Fragment
keys.location: Found inside an old well bucket
keys.description: A curved fragment of an emblem. It appears incomplete.

keys.name: Sun & Moon Emblem
keys.description: Two fragments joined together to form a complete emblem.
